name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve CodeMantis
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **macOS version:** (e.g., Sequoia 15.4)
- **CodeMantis version:** (e.g., v0.8.4)
- **Claude Code CLI version:** (run `claude --version`)
- **Chip:** Apple Silicon / Intel

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here (e.g., console logs, error messages).
